derivation.source: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_InvoiceLine WHERE C_Invoice_ID=@C_Invoice_ID@

processEndpoints.name: completeInvoice
preconditions: Invoice must have at least one line
Invoice status must be DR (Draft) or IP (In Progress)
All invoice lines must have a product assigned
All invoice lines must have a positive quantity

processEndpoints.name: voidInvoice
preconditions: Invoice must not have payments applied

queryParams.filtering: Use field name as query param: ?fieldName=value
